title: Bitter Flaky Olive Crumble
description: A cozy Egyptian dish featuring bitter greens baked in a flaky crust made with extra virgin olive oil, ideal for breakfast or light meals.

ingredients.name: Bitter Greens (e.g. Arugula or Endives)
ingredients.notes: Wash and tear into small pieces.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Shortening (such as Crisco or Vegetable Crumbs)
Fresh Herbs (optional, such as Thyme or Rosemary)

instructions: In a large bowl, mix olive oil with bitter greens and chopped herbs. Season lightly with salt and sugar.
Add vegetable shortening, flour, and hot water; stir until the mixture forms a dough-like consistency. Knead slightly if needed.
Divide the mixture into small crumble balls or pats to fit your baking dish (about 1/2 inch thick).
Place on a parchment-lined baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes, until golden brown and crisp around the edges.
Serve warm, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
